reviews.name: James T.
reviews.text: Prompt service, good communications, and good follow up service. Kenney & Co. is our go-to commercial electrician.

reviews.name: George F.
reviews.text: Very professional and neat and clean. Very pleased with the final product. Would recommend to any business owner.

reviews.name: Office Manager
reviews.text: They retrofitted our entire office to LED with zero downtime. The energy savings paid for the project in under a year.
